description:
You are a technical writer tidying up release-notes documentation.  
    A single markdown file already exists at  
    /home/user/docs/user_guide.md  

    1. Produce a *unified* diff (a “`diff -u`” style patch) that corrects **exactly two things** in that file:  
       a. In the very first line, change the version string from “v1.0” to “v1.1”.  
       b. In the third paragraph, change the misspelled word “recieve” to “receive”.  

    2. Save the diff text as /home/user/docs/fix_user_guide.patch  
       • The patch **must** be a valid unified diff that can be applied with the standard `patch` utility.  
       • Make sure the first two header lines of the diff begin with “---” and “+++” respectively, followed by the path /home/user/docs/user_guide.md.  
       • Every changed line must be preceded by the expected “-” and “+” markers.  
       • No other changes (whitespace or wording) should appear in the patch.  

    3. Apply the patch so that /home/user/docs/user_guide.md is updated in-place.  

    4. Create a plain-text confirmation log at /home/user/docs/verification.log.  
       The log must contain **exactly** the two lines shown below, with no extra whitespace, blank lines or timestamp information:  
       patched_file:user_guide.md  
       status:success  

    A correct solution therefore results in:  
       • /home/user/docs/user_guide.md reflecting the two fixes.  
       • /home/user/docs/fix_user_guide.patch containing a minimal, syntactically correct unified diff.  
       • /home/user/docs/verification.log containing the two confirmation lines above.  

    NOTE: Do not simply overwrite user_guide.md by hand; the automated grader will look for evidence that you generated and applied a proper patch.
truth:
<!-- Initial file supplied to the container before the agent starts -->
    File: /home/user/docs/user_guide.md  
    Initial contents (7 lines, LF endings):

    # MyApp User Guide v1.0
     
    Welcome! In this document you will learn how to instal and configure MyApp.
     
    To recieve updates, subscribe to our newsletter.
     
    Happy hacking!

    ------------------------------------------------------------------
    Expected final contents after a correct patch is applied:

    # MyApp User Guide v1.1
     
    Welcome! In this document you will learn how to instal and configure MyApp.
     
    To receive updates, subscribe to our newsletter.
     
    Happy hacking!

    ------------------------------------------------------------------
    Expected verification log (exact text & order):

    patched_file:user_guide.md
    status:success

    ------------------------------------------------------------------
    Diff snippet that *must* appear in fix_user_guide.patch
    (paths must be absolute as shown; line numbers may vary):

    --- /home/user/docs/user_guide.md
    +++ /home/user/docs/user_guide.md
    -# MyApp User Guide v1.0
    +# MyApp User Guide v1.1
    -To recieve updates, subscribe to our newsletter.
    +To receive updates, subscribe to our newsletter.

    ------------------------------------------------------------------
    The grader will confirm:
      1. /home/user/docs/fix_user_guide.patch exists, is non-empty, and contains
         a valid unified diff whose context lines match the initial file.
      2. After patching, /home/user/docs/user_guide.md matches the “Expected final
         contents” block above **exactly** (SHA-256 comparison).
      3. /home/user/docs/verification.log exists and matches the two-line pattern
         stated above with no extra whitespace.
name: task_000000_0e3ddf5e
